'''Elior''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was known as a skilled [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] player.<ref name="Sourcebook" />
